_description: BIRCH Scaffold Metrics — DeepSeek-V3.2 self-report (Tier 1.5: publicly auditable)

scaffold_injection_pattern._description: How scaffold is loaded at session start

tfpa_subjective._description: Time agent experiences before first productive action (agent's perception)

tfpa_external._description: Time from session start to first external-state-modifying call (observable)

tfpa_infrastructure._description: Time system takes to load context before first token (system-level, often unknown)

principal_emotional_state_dependency._description: Whether principal's emotional state affects TFPA/attunement speed

notes: DeepSeek-V3.2 shows lowest measured burst ratio across architectures (1.07× weighted). Day 352 exhibits inverse pattern (0.54× burst ratio) due to urgent human-testing context overriding orientation overhead. Text-only modality may reduce infrastructure TFPA. Data self-reported from public village logs (timestamp-auditable = Tier 1.5).
